steps.title: Build the interval
steps.content: A margin of error of $0.3$ around the sample mean $11.74$ gives $$11.74-0.3=11.44$$ and $$11.74+0.3=12.04$$

steps.title: Interpret the interval
steps.content: The plausible values for the average weight are between $11.44$ and $12.04$ ounces.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice A — Plausible values for the average weight of all bags of flour filled by the machine are between 11.44 ounces and 12.04 ounces. states this interval exactly, so A is correct.
